#弅喃木剉﹛﹛??﹛巟鼹
#
#﹛﹛﹛凌607990及摒

###﹛凌607990午凌607980毛赭当

block Item_607990 >= 1 && Item_607980 >= 1

	KillItem 607990,1,(3004861)
	KillItem 607980,1,(3004862)
	GiveItem(607680%15,607685%10,608600%10,608603%10,607994%15,607718%15,631056%5,631057%10,631058%10),(3004863)



###﹛宁丹坁互卅中

block

	SystemMessage 3004868
